name: Tavern Brawl
description: Raised voices and shattered crockery erupt from a roadside alehouse. Two farmers grapple over a spilled drink while the innkeeper wrings her hands. A well-placed word might calm the storm — or a poor one could drag you into the fray.
failureConsequence: Your intervention backfires spectacularly. A wild punch catches your jaw, the innkeeper bars you from her establishment, and you nurse a bruised ego along with a swollen lip.
